texto: Why don't women have respect for themselves nowadays? What happen to the woman who learned her grandmama's recipes and made her man sweet potato pie? I tell you, they don't make 'em like they used to. Will my real women stand up, please?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brandon T. Jackson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Why don't women have respect for themselves nowadays? What happen to the woman who learned her gr…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, women, man pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de man e woman.
